title: Nutty Choco Date Night
description: A delightful Peruvian dish featuring a blend of nuttiness and juiciness with a low-sodium twist, topped with milk chocolate for added indulgence.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup of chopped walnuts
ingredients.notes: ensure they are roasted and not raw to enhance the nuttiness

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup of finely chopped fresh mint leaves

instructions: Place the dates in a heatproof bowl and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 10 minutes, or until they are soft.
In a small saucepan, combine the chopped walnuts, peanut butter, and milk chocolate chunks. Stir until well combined and heated through without melting the chocolate completely.
Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly. Add in finely chopped mint leaves if using.
Divide the cooled chocolate mixture among four plates or bowls for serving. Serve immediately as a delightful dessert.
